2026-04-08T19:20:42.2477025Z changes and commit them, and you can discard any commits you make in this
2026-04-08T19:20:42.2482878Z state without impacting any branches by switching back to a branch.
2026-04-08T19:20:42.2484906Z 
2026-04-08T19:20:42.2485458Z If you want to create a new branch to retain commits you create, you may
2026-04-08T19:20:42.2489006Z do so (now or later) by using -c with the switch command. Example:
2026-04-08T19:20:42.2489795Z 
2026-04-08T19:20:42.2490087Z   git switch -c <new-branch-name>
2026-04-08T19:20:42.2490630Z
